title: ononis serrata subsp. diffusa
intro: Ononis serrata subsp. diffusa, also known as spreading restharrow, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Ononis serrata subsp. diffusa include its potential to help with urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Ononis serrata subsp. diffusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
